stylePrefix: Minimalistic modern digital art, clean vector-style illustration with subtle gradients, muted pastel color palette (soft navy #1a1a2e, dusty rose #e8c4c4, warm cream #f5f0e8, sage green #a8c5a0, slate blue #6b7b8d), flat design with soft drop shadows, thin clean outlines. No text, no watermarks. Transparent background.

assets.prompt: Small stylized developer character, side view, standing idle with subtle breathing animation. Wears hoodie and laptop bag. Chibi proportions. 4 frames side by side in horizontal strip, transparent bg.
Same developer character, side view, 8-frame walk cycle showing full stride. Frames in horizontal strip, transparent bg.
Same developer character, side view, waving hand greeting. 4 frames in horizontal strip, transparent bg.
Wide gradient sky, deep navy blue top to warm peach/rose at horizon. Subtle geometric stars and crescent moon. No ground.
Far-away minimalistic city skyline silhouette, muted dark blue-gray. Simple geometric buildings. Seamlessly tileable horizontally, transparent bg.
Rolling hills, soft sage green and dusty blue. Few abstract geometric trees. Seamlessly tileable horizontally, transparent bg.
Near-distance stylized geometric trees and bushes, darker sage green. Triangular/circular shapes. Tileable horizontally, transparent bg.
Flat ground/path surface. Smooth dark slate with subtle texture, clean grass edge on top in sage green. Tileable horizontally, transparent bg.
Minimalistic decorative archway/gate, modern clean design with thin metal frame, subtle glow. Section divider, transparent bg.
Modern minimalistic directional signpost with blank arrow-shaped planks pointing right. Clean metal post, warm cream/brown planks, transparent bg.
Modern floating holographic computer terminal, sleek rounded edges, dark screen with subtle blue glow, futuristic design, transparent bg.
Minimalistic modern desk setup from side view: monitor, coffee cup, small plant, keyboard. Warm tones, transparent bg.
Modern minimalistic notice/kanban board on standing post, wooden frame, cream background. Empty board surface. Side view, transparent bg.
Minimalistic modern office building, glass facade, warm window lighting. Side view, transparent bg.
Different minimalistic office building, smaller, rooftop garden element. Side view, transparent bg.
Minimalistic startup office, creative facade, large windows, colorful accents. Side view, transparent bg.
Minimalistic industrial/engineering building, subtle mechanical facade elements. Side view, transparent bg.
Open laptop from slight angle, modern thin design, screen glowing with abstract colorful UI, transparent bg.
Minimalistic cloud computing symbol, stylized cloud with subtle server nodes inside, soft blue/white, transparent bg.
Modern clean speech bubble, rounded rectangle with tail at bottom-left, subtle shadow, cream/white, transparent bg.
Modern floating UI panel, dark translucent bg with border glow, rounded corners. Dashboard-style, transparent bg.
Empty progress bar track, rounded rectangle, dark translucent with thin glowing border, transparent bg.
Filled progress bar, rounded rectangle, gradient sage green to teal, subtle inner glow, transparent bg.
Minimalistic C# programming language icon, purple/violet tones, transparent bg.
Minimalistic JavaScript icon, yellow tones, transparent bg.
Minimalistic Python icon, blue and yellow tones, transparent bg.
Minimalistic university building, classical architecture as clean geometric shapes, columns, triangular roof. Warm stone, transparent bg.
Minimalistic diploma/degree certificate, rolled scroll with ribbon/seal, cream and gold, transparent bg.
Stylized knowledge tree, geometric trunk branching into two main branches with leaf clusters for degree levels. Warm wood/green, transparent bg.
Modern stylized mailbox/message terminal, subtle glow indicating incoming messages, transparent bg.
Row of 4 minimalistic icons (mail envelope, GitHub cat, LinkedIn square, generic link), geometric, side by side, transparent bg.
4-frame animated scroll/mouse indicator, arrow pointing right with pulse. Horizontal strip, transparent bg.
Small filled circle, warm cream, subtle glow, transparent bg.
Small hollow circle, muted gray outline, transparent bg.
Modern minimalistic street lamp, thin pole with geometric lantern, warm glow cone downward, transparent bg.
Modern minimalistic park bench, wooden seat on metal frame, side view, transparent bg.
Modern minimalistic potted succulent, geometric pot, transparent bg.
4 soft glowing firefly sprites, small dots with radial glow, warm cream/gold, horizontal strip, transparent bg.
6-frame bird silhouette flight animation, small dark silhouettes, horizontal strip, transparent bg.
Single clean card/plank for notice board, rounded corners, subtle shadow, cream/white with thin border, transparent bg.
